while q != []: x, y = q.pop() DIR = [(-1, 0), (1, 0), (0, 1), (0, -1)] for d in DIR: nx, ny = x + d[0], y + d[1] if 0 <= nx < W and 0 <= ny < H and S[y][x] != S[ny][nx] and not visited[ny][nx]: visited[ny][nx] = True if S[ny][nx] == '.': white += 1 else: black += 1 q.append((nx, ny))

for x in range(W): for y in range(H): ans += bfs(x, y)
for y in range(H): ans += bfs(x, y)
